title: Jia Ma
html:
Jia Ma

Stub. Director of the CIEE Shanghai "China in Global Context" program — Yahir's program-of-record administrator during fall 2024 Shanghai semester. First mentioned in 2024 09 11 thoughts and things 9112024 ("after this 'Chinas macroeconomic impact' class I will meet with the director Jia Ma").
